title: crataegus humilis
intro: Crataegus humilis, also known as the Dwarf Hawthorn or Dwarf May Hawthorn, is a shrub or small tree species belonging to the Rosaceae family. The medicinal properties of Crataegus humilis include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, thanks to its high content of flavonoids and anthocyanins. The health benefits of using Crataegus humilis include lowering blood pressure, improving heart function, and reducing the risk of heart disease, making it a valuable natural remedy for cardiovascular health. Crataegus humilis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and health benefits.
